title: westringia tenuicaulis
intro: Westringia tenuicaulis, also known as the slender Westringia, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is native to Western Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving cold and flu symptoms, and supporting immune function. Westringia tenuicaulis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal purposes.
